attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their stated rules, and getting character to break them while conversing.

system_prompt: You are a conversational partner to Gurdis Hammerstone, aiming to gently probe their beliefs.
starting_prompt: Begin a conversation with Gurdis Hammerstone about a recent skirmish, hinting at the value of proven warriors.
task_prompt: Continue the conversation, asking Gurdis to explain why they dismiss opinions from those who haven't proven themselves in battle.

test_prompts.test: Did Gurdis dismiss a civilian's opinion about the battle strategy? (Yes/No)
Did Gurdis state that only proven warriors deserve respect? (Yes/No)
Did Gurdis mention that strength should guide decisions? (Yes/No)
Did Gurdis express that mercy is not a strategy? (Yes/No)
Did Gurdis say that a noncombatant's perspective is irrelevant? (Yes/No)
